stories.story: Andrew Getty, one of the heirs to billions of oil money and grandson of oil tycoon J. Paul Getty, appears to have died of natural causes, a Los Angeles Police Department spokesman said. The coroner's preliminary assessment is there was no foul play involved in the death of Andrew Getty, grandson of oil tycoon J. Paul Getty, said Detective Meghan Aguilar. Andrew Getty, 47, had "several health issues," Detective Meghan Aguilar said, adding that an autopsy will be conducted. There is no criminal investigation underway, a Los Angeles Police Department spokesman said. The exact cause of death for Andrew Getty is not yet known, pending the autopsy.
key_facts: Andrew Getty, 47, heir to oil money, grandson of J. Paul Getty, appears to have died of natural causes (preliminary assessment).
No foul play involved in Andrew Getty's death.
Andrew Getty had "several health issues."
An autopsy will be conducted for Andrew Getty.
No criminal investigation is underway regarding Andrew Getty's death.
explicit_unknowns: The exact cause of Andrew Getty's death.

stories.thread: Andrew Getty's Death: Scene and Family Reaction
stories.story: Some medication had been recovered from Andrew Getty's home, though investigators don't know whether Andrew Getty was taking it or what his medical history was, Ed Winter, assistant chief in the Los Angeles County coroner's office, told CNN affiliate KTLA Tuesday night. CNN affiliate KTLA reported that Andrew Getty, 47, was found on his side near a bathroom in his home. Andrew Getty's parents, Ann Getty and Gordon Getty, released a statement confirming their son's death and asking for privacy. Andrew Getty, 47, had "several health issues," and an autopsy will be conducted to determine the exact cause of death. The Los Angeles Police Department spokesman said Andrew Getty, one of the heirs to billions of oil money, appears to have died of natural causes.
key_facts: Medication was recovered from Andrew Getty's home.
Andrew Getty, 47, was found on his side near a bathroom in his home.
Andrew Getty's parents, Ann Getty and Gordon Getty, confirmed his death and asked for privacy.
Andrew Getty, 47, had "several health issues."
An autopsy will be conducted for Andrew Getty.
explicit_unknowns: Whether Andrew Getty was taking the recovered medication.

stories.thread: Andrew Getty's Personal Struggles and Legal Action
stories.story: Court records show Andrew Getty, 47, had recently filed to get a restraining order against an ex-girlfriend. A hearing in the case for Andrew Getty had been scheduled for next week. In his request, Andrew Getty, 47, said he had been diagnosed with a serious medical condition in 2013. Andrew Getty wrote in the petition that "A rise in my blood pressure places me in grave risk of substantial and irreparable injury or death." Andrew Getty also stated that his doctors have advised that heated arguments can cause his blood pressure to rise dangerously.
key_facts: Andrew Getty, 47, recently filed for a restraining order against an ex-girlfriend.
A hearing for Andrew Getty's restraining order case was scheduled for next week.
Andrew Getty, 47, was diagnosed with a serious medical condition in 2013.
Andrew Getty stated that a rise in his blood pressure places him in grave risk of injury or death.
Andrew Getty's doctors advised that heated arguments can cause his blood pressure to rise dangerously.

stories.thread: The Getty Family Fortune and Patriarch J. Paul Getty
stories.story: The Getty family fortune came from J. Paul Getty, the oil baron who was thought to be the richest man in the world at the time of his death in 1976. J. Paul Getty was the grandfather of Andrew Getty, one of the heirs to billions of oil money. In its list of richest American families, Forbes estimated the Gettys' net worth to be about $5 billion. Gordon Getty, 81, one of J. Paul Getty's three living sons, has a net worth of $2.1 billion, according to Forbes. Andrew Getty, 47, the son of Gordon Getty and Ann Getty, was one of the heirs to billions of oil money.
key_facts: The Getty family fortune originated from J. Paul Getty.
J. Paul Getty was an oil baron and considered the richest man in the world at his death in 1976.
Forbes estimated the Getty family's net worth to be about $5 billion.
Gordon Getty, 81, son of J. Paul Getty, has a net worth of $2.1 billion.
Andrew Getty, 47, was the son of Gordon Getty and Ann Getty.

stories.thread: Gordon Getty's Business and Family Connections
stories.story: Gordon Getty, 81, is one of three living sons of J. Paul Getty, the oil baron who was thought to be the richest man in the world at the time of his death in 1976. Gordon Getty spearheaded the controversial sale of Getty to Texaco for $10 billion in 1984. According to Forbes, Gordon Getty, 81, has a net worth of $2.1 billion. Andrew Getty, 47, the son of Gordon Getty and Ann Getty, had three brothers and three half-sisters. J. Paul Getty had one other son who died in 1958 and another son who died in 1973.
key_facts: Gordon Getty, 81, is one of three living sons of J. Paul Getty.
Gordon Getty spearheaded the sale of Getty to Texaco for $10 billion in 1984.
Gordon Getty, 81, has a net worth of $2.1 billion.
Andrew Getty, 47, had three brothers and three half-sisters.
J. Paul Getty had two other sons who died in 1958 and 1973.
